description: Patient Matt Zenon Betz requires a comprehensive social determinants of health (SDOH) intake assessment. Update his GNU Health profile to reflect a University level education, an Engineer occupation, a physically active lifestyle, and non-smoker status. Add a family history entry for a first-degree relative with Cardiovascular/Coronary Artery Disease (ICD-10 I25.x or I21.x), include a mobile phone contact, and schedule a preventive care appointment with Dr. Cordara between 150 and 200 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
